purpose: Deploy proposal-applier cron to break GRAO pipeline stall
execution_protocol: 2. Filter to underrepresented clusters (skip validated clusters)
3. Select proposal via round-robin across clusters
4. Design validation experiment targeting proposal's tpgTarget
6. Record results as exp_YYYY-MM-DD in experiments/
7. Update GRAO STATE-MANAGEMENT.md with validation status

cluster_balancing.balancing_rule: Round-robin across clusters, skip validated clusters until 20% threshold met

first_execution.validation_approach: Cross-reference stability tests with paper archive benchmark methodology findings
first_execution.infrastructure: paper archive (459 papers), stability test suite, benchmark_2026-05-16.json

notes: This spec replaces the design-only state. First execution should run exp_03 validation immediately.
